prestazioni: Engine swap to a 2.5L TDI (engine code: AJT) with a BorgWarner EFR 7670 turbocharger, custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe, and a Pierburg CWA 100 high-pressure fuel pump for 300+ HP on 98 RON fuel

Full custom VR6 (engine code: AAA) conversion with a Schrick 268° camshaft, Mahle forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), and a custom air-to-water intercooler setup using a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger and a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers with custom valving for the T4’s unique torsion beam front suspension, paired with Powerflex polyurethane bushings (part #PFF80-601) and a Whiteline front sway bar (24mm) for reduced body roll
estetica: Rocket Bunny-inspired widebody kit for the T4 (custom fabricated from 1.2mm steel), featuring extended front fenders, a vented hood, and a rear diffuser with integrated twin exhaust outlets for a 2.5L TDI setup
Full custom interior with Recaro Pole Position seats (part #38806005) mounted on custom brackets, a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel, and a full Alcantara headliner with red contrast stitching
Custom 3-piece BBS RS-GT wheels (8x17 ET35 front, 9x17 ET25 rear) with Nankang AR-1 semi-slick tires (215/40/17 front, 235/40/17 rear) and custom center caps featuring the VW Motorsport logo
